heading: Certification of treatment of payments under other laws
label: 7385e Certification of treatment of payments under other laws
notes: Amendments2004— substituted “this subchapter” for “part B”.Pub. L. 108–375
amendments: Amendments2004— substituted “this subchapter” for “part B”.Pub. L. 108–375

children.text: shall be treated for purposes of the internal revenue laws of the United States as damages for human suffering; and
shall not be included as income or resources for purposes of determining eligibility to receive benefits described in or the amount of such benefits.section 3803(c)(2)(C) of title 31
